response.justification: Strong senior software engineer with broad technical experience across many languages and open-source/Linux ecosystems, but the role explicitly requires German C1 and the candidate self-reports only basic German. The resume also shows individual-contributor work rather than a track record of leading interdisciplinary teams at the executive level, and there's no mention of UML proficiency or formal requirements management.
strengths: Deep open-source, Linux, and polyglot software development background spanning web, embedded, and infrastructure
Founder of GISCollective showing architecture ownership and long-term technical stewardship
Teaching/workshop experience (Selenium course, Web Internals) demonstrating mentoring and communication ability
concerns: German listed as Basic only, well below required C1 proficiency
No demonstrated executive/Head-of-Development leadership or formal team management track record
Missing explicit UML, requirements management, and IT security/compliance experience
